request: Add a protective one-line comment at writesConsentPath in .claude/hooks/lib/common.mjs: the post-expansion `if (!CONSENT_REF_RE.test(expanded)) return false;` check MUST run after variable expansion because it catches var-assembled consent basenames (e.g. `VAR=spec_approvals; tee $VAR/x.approval`, where `spec_approvals/` is completed only at the use site). Moving the reject onto the raw scan would reintroduce a bypass. Comment-only; no behavior change. Rebuild the template (manifest hash) since a baseline-owned hook file changes.
